elements.sent-2411-001: In this paper, for any $\lambda\geq1,~R_\lambda^2$ is the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space.}
elements.sent-2411-002: The exact value of $L_\mathrm{YJ (\xi,\eta,X)$ for this space will be calculated.}
elements.sent-2411-003: Specifically, $L_{\mathrm{YJ ( \xi , \eta , R_{\lambda ^{2 ) = 1+ \frac {2\xi \eta {\xi ^{2 + \eta ^{2 ( 1- \frac 1{\lambda ^{2 )$ is the result thereafter through meticilous computation.}}}}}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-005: Throughout this article, let $X$ be a real Banach space with dimension at least 2.
elements.sent-2411-006: We will define $S_X$ as the unit sphere, that is $S_X=\{x\in X:\|x\|_X=1\};B_X$ as the closed unit ball, that is $B_X=\{x\in X:\|x\|_X\leq1\}.$ Additionally, we will use $ext(B_x)$ to indicate the collection of extreme points of $B_x.$ The geometric properties of Banach spaces are studied in terms of their geometric constants.
elements.sent-2411-007: We can better comprehend and analyze the features of Banach spaces by using alternative geometric constants, which may give us distinct geometric characteristic information about the space.
elements.sent-2411-008: Investigating the exact value of geometric constants for particular spaces is therefore beneficial to us.
elements.sent-2411-009: The authors presented the space $R_{\lambda ^2$ in \cite{2 , which is considered to be $R_{\lambda ^{2 :=(R^{2 ,\|\cdot\|_{\lambda )$, where $\lambda>1$ and \begin{equation}\|(a,b)\|=\max\left\{\lambda|a|,\sqrt{a^{2}+b^{2}}\right\}.\end{equation}.}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-010: Furthermore, the authors named the space as the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space.}
elements.sent-2411-011: The Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space was generalized by C.. Yang and X.}
elements.sent-2411-013: Let's now go over the definitions and findings of a few geometric constants that are relevant to the topic that follows.
elements.sent-2411-014: Remember that the definition of James constant $J(X) $\cite{12 as shown below: \begin{equation}J(X)=\sup\left\{\min\{\|x+y\|,\|x-y\|\}:x,y\in X,\|x\|=1,\|y\|=1\right\}.\end{equation}.}
elements.sent-2411-015: With the deepening of the research, in \cite{1 , scholars have generalized the James constant $J(X)$, and the generalized form is as follows:\begin{equation}J_{\lambda,\mu}(X)=\sup\Big\{\min\{\|\lambda x+\mu y\|,\|\mu x-\lambda y\|\}:x,y\in B_X\Big\}.\end{equation}.}
elements.sent-2411-016: Furthermore, in\cite{03 , the author defined the James type constant as\begin{equation}J_{X,t}(\tau)=\sup\{\mu_t(\|x+\tau y\|,\|x-\tau y\|):x,y\in S_X\}.\end{equation}.}
elements.sent-2411-017: By careful calculation, C.. Yang and X.
elements.sent-2411-018: Yang\cite{02 obtained the exact value of the James type constant for the $X_{\lambda,p}$ space.}
elements.sent-2411-019: The results is as follows: \begin{equation}J_{X_{\lambda,p},t}(1)=2^{1-\frac{1}{t}}\Big(1+\Big(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{p}}\Big)^{\frac{t}{p}}\Big)^{\frac{1}{t}}, if~t\geq p, 2^{1-\frac{1}{t}}\lambda\left(1+\lambda^{\frac{tp}{t-p}}\right)^{\frac{1}{t}-\frac{1}{p}}, ift<p~and~\lambda^{p}\leq1+\lambda^{\frac{p}{p}}, 2^{1-\frac{1}{t}}\Big(1+\Big(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{p}}\Big)^{\frac{t}{p}}\Big)^{\frac{1}{t}}, if~t<p~and~\lambda^{p}\geq1+\lambda^{\frac{p}{p}}.\end{equation} In \cite{01.1 , Clarkson defined the von Neumannâ€“Jordan constant of a Banach space X as the smallest constant C for which \begin{equation}\frac{1}{C}\leq\frac{\|x+y\|^2+\|x-y\|^2}{2\|x\|^2+2\|y\|^2}\leq C,\end{equation} where $x,y\in X$ and not both $0$.}
elements.sent-2411-020: Subsequently, the von Neumann-Jordan constant scholars are provided with an equivalent definition by study, as follows: \begin{equation}C_{NJ}(X) = \sup \left\{ \frac{\|x + y\|^2 + \|x - y\|^2}{2\|x\|^2 + 2\|y\|^2}:x,y\in X ~not both 0\right\}.\end{equation}.
elements.sent-2411-021: The von Neumann-Jordan constant $C_{\mathrm{NJ (X)$ has been shown to be a useful tool for characterizing Hilbert spaces, uniformly non-square spaces, and super-reflexive spaces after a great deal of investigation by scholars.}}
elements.sent-2411-022: For additional information and findings about $C_{\mathrm{NJ (X)$, see \cite{09,12 .}}}
elements.sent-2411-023: Naturally, a lot of academics are also fixated on figuring out how much this constant is in particular spaces.
elements.sent-2411-024: The authors then gave the precise value of $C_\mathrm{NJ (R^2_{\lambda )$ in \cite{04 , where $C_\mathrm{NJ (R^2_{\lambda )=2-\frac{1 {\lambda^2}$.}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-025: While many scholars are studying the properties of the $C_{\mathrm{NJ (X)$ constant itself, other scholars have begun to generalize the constant.}}
elements.sent-2411-026: Thus, in \cite{06 , the generalized von Neumann-Jordan constant is defined as \begin{equation}C_NJ^{(p)}(X):=\sup\left\{\frac{\|x+y\|^p+\|x-y\|^p}{2^{p-1}\left(\|x\|^p+\|y\|^p\right)}:x,y\in X,(x,y)\neq(0,0)\right\},\end{equation} where $1\leq p<\infty.$ The exact value of the $C_\mathrm{NJ ^{(p) (X)$ constant for the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space, which was determined in 2018 by C.. Yang and H.}}}}
elements.sent-2411-027: Li \cite{07 was presented by where $\lambda>1,~p\geq2$, for any $\lambda$ such that $\lambda^2(1-\frac{1 {\lambda^2 )^\frac{p {2}\geq1$, $C_\mathrm{NJ ^{p (R^2_\lambda)=1+(1-\frac{1 {\lambda^2 )^\frac{p {2}$.}}}}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-028: In a new research, Liu et al.\cite{08 introduced a new geometric constant with a skew connection that denotes to $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,X)$ for $\xi,\eta>0$ as \begin{equation}L_Y J(\xi,\eta,X)=\sup \left\{\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(\|x\|^2+\|y\|^2)}: x,y\in X, (x,y)\neq (0,0) \right\}.\end{equation}.}}
elements.formula-2411-009: \begin{equation}L_Y J(\xi,\eta,X)=\sup \left\{\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(\|x\|^2+\|y\|^2)}: x,y\in X, (x,y)\neq (0,0) \right\}.\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-029: Additionally, the author \cite{11 provides a comparable constant \begin{equation}L'_Y J(\xi,\eta,X)=\sup \left\{\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{2(\|x\|^2+\|y\|^2)}: x,y\in S_X \right\}.\end{equation}.}
elements.formula-2411-010: \begin{equation}L'_Y J(\xi,\eta,X)=\sup \left\{\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{2(\|x\|^2+\|y\|^2)}: x,y\in S_X \right\}.\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-030: In recent years, a few scholars began to conduct research on the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi, \eta, X)$ constant.}
elements.sent-2411-031: The authors \cite{09 compared the relationship between the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi, \eta, X)$ constant and the $J_{\lambda, \mu (X)$ constant, and established an inequality between these two constants.}}}
elements.sent-2411-032: Furthermore, in the same year, the authors \cite{10 obtain the exact value of the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi, \eta, X)$ constant and the $L'_\mathrm{Y J (\xi, \eta, X)$ constant for the regular octagon space.}}}
elements.sent-2411-033: Naturally we want to ask"what's $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,X)$ constant for the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space?" In this article, we calculate and prove that for any $\lambda>1$, $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,R_{\lambda ^2)=1+\frac{2\xi \eta {\xi^2+\eta^2 (1-\frac{1 {\lambda^{2 ).$.}}}}}}}}}

elements.sent-2411-052: The following Theorem \ref{key is our main result in this article.}
elements.sent-2411-053: To prove the theorem, we prove that \begin{equation}\label{e1} {\frac{\|\xi x+\eta ty\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi ty\|^2}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)}\leq 1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}})},\end{equation} holds for any $x,y\in ext(Bx)$ and any $t\in [0,1]$ first.
elements.sent-2411-054: Then we consider where $\lambda\geq\sqrt{2}$ .. Assume that $\lambda\geq\sqrt{2}$.
elements.sent-2411-055: Note that $ext(Bx)=\left\{(z_1,z_2):z_1^2+z_2^2=1,|z_1|\leq\frac{1 {\lambda}\right\}.$ To prove (\ref{e1 ),we consider the following situations: Case(1) If \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right|\geq\sqrt{\left(\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\xi x_{2}+\eta t y_{2}\right)^{2}},\end{equation} and \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right|\geq\sqrt{\left(\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\eta x_{2}+\xi t y_{2}\right)^{2}}.\end{equation}.}}
elements.formula-2411-026: \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right|\geq\sqrt{\left(\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\xi x_{2}+\eta t y_{2}\right)^{2}},\end{equation}
elements.formula-2411-027: \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right|\geq\sqrt{\left(\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\eta x_{2}+\xi t y_{2}\right)^{2}}.\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-056: Then we have \begin{equation}\begin{split} \|\xi x+\eta t y\|^{2}+\|\eta x-\xi t y\|^{2} =\lambda^{2}(\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1})^{2}+\lambda^{2}(\eta x_{1}-\xi ty_{1})^{2} =\lambda^{2}(\xi ^{2}+\eta^{2})(x_{1}^{2}+t^{2}y_{1}^{2})\leq(\xi^{2}+\eta^{2})(1+t^{2}), \end{split}\end{equation} so \begin{equation}{\frac{\|\xi x+\eta ty\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi ty\|^2}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)}\leq\frac{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)}\leq 1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}})}.\end{equation}.

elements.sent-2411-059: Then we have \begin{equation}\begin{aligned}||\xi x+\eta ty||^{2}+||\eta x-\xi ty||^{2} =\lambda^2(\xi x_{1}+\eta ty_{1})^{2}+(\eta x_{1}-\xi ty_1)^2(\eta x_{2}-\xi ty_{2})^{2} =\xi^{2}t^2+\eta^{2}+2t(\lambda^{2}-1)\xi \eta|x_{1}y_{1}| +2t\xi \eta \sqrt{1-x_1^{2}}\sqrt{1-y_1^{2}}+\lambda^{2}t^{2}\eta^{2}y_1^{2}+\lambda^{2}\xi^{2}x_1^{2}.\end{aligned}\end{equation} For Case(2) and Case(3), by applying Lemma \ref{l1 ,we have \begin{equation}\begin{aligned} \frac{\|\xi x+\eta ty\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi ty\|^2}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)} \leq 1+\frac{2(2-\frac{2}{\lambda^2})\xi \eta t}{(\xi^2+\eta^2)(1+t^2)} \leq 1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}}). \end{aligned}\end{equation} Case(4) If \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right|\leq\sqrt{\left(\xi x_{1}+\eta t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\xi x_{2}+\eta t y_{2}\right)^{2}},\end{equation} and \begin{equation}\lambda\left|\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right|\leq\sqrt{\left(\eta x_{1}-\xi t y_{1}\right)^{2}+\left(\eta x_{2}+\xi t y_{2}\right)^{2}}.\end{equation}.}

elements.formula-2411-037: \begin{equation}\label{e5} ||\xi x+\eta ty||^{2}+||\eta x-\xi ty||^{2} =(\xi x_{1}+\eta ty_{1})^{2}+(\xi x_{2}+\eta ty_{2})^{2}+\lambda^{2}(\eta x_{1}-\xi ty_{1})^{2} =\xi^{2}+\eta^{2}t^{2}+2t(\lambda^{2}-1)\xi \eta|x_{1}y_{1})| +2t\xi \eta sin\sqrt{1-x^{2}}\sqrt{1-y^{2}}+\lambda^{2}t^{2}\xi^{2}y_1^{2}+\lambda^{2}\eta^{2}x_1^{2} \leq\xi^{2}+\eta^{2}t^{2}+4t\xi\eta\cdot\frac{\lambda^2-1}{\lambda^2}+t^2\xi^2+\eta^2 =(\xi^{2}+\eta^{2})(1+t^{2}) +4t\xi\eta\cdot\frac{\lambda^2-1}{\lambda^2},\end{equation}
elements.formula-2411-038: \begin{equation}\label{e6} ||\xi x+\eta ty||^{2}+||\eta x-\xi ty||^{2} =\lambda^2(\xi x_{1}+\eta ty_{1})^{2}+(\eta x_{1}-\xi ty_1)^2(\eta x_{2}-\xi ty_{2})^{2} =\xi^{2}t^2+\eta^{2}+2t(\lambda^{2}-1)\xi \eta|x_{1}y_{1})| +2t\xi \eta sin\sqrt{1-x^{2}}\sqrt{1-y^{2}}+\lambda^{2}t^{2}\eta^{2}y_1^{2}+\lambda^{2}\xi^{2}x_1^{2} \leq\xi^{2}t^2+\eta^{2}+4t\xi\eta\cdot\frac{\lambda^2-1}{\lambda^2}+\xi^2+\eta^2t^2 =(\xi^{2}+\eta^{2})(1+t^{2}) +4t\xi\eta\cdot\frac{\lambda^2-1}{\lambda^2}.\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-065: On the other hand, if taking $x=\left(\frac{1 {\lambda ,\sqrt{1-\frac{1 {\lambda^2 }\right)$,$y=\left(\frac{1 {\lambda ,-\sqrt{1-\frac{1 {\lambda^2 }\right)$, we have $\|x\|=1$, $\|y\|=1$.. Then\begin{equation}\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)}=1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}}).\end{equation}.}}}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-067: Hence, we have \begin{equation}\frac{\|\xi x+\eta y\|^2+\|\eta x-\xi y\|^2}{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)}=\frac{(\xi+\eta)^2+(\xi+\eta)^2-\frac{4\xi\eta}{\lambda^2}}{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)} =\frac{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)+4\xi\eta-\frac{4\xi\eta}{\lambda^2}}{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)} =1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}}).\end{equation}. Therefore, \begin{equation}\label{e9} L_\mathrm{Y J}(\xi,\eta,R_{\lambda}^2)\geq1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}}).\end{equation}.
elements.sent-2411-068: By using (\ref{e1 ) and (\ref{e9 ), we complete the proof of the Theorem \ref{key .}}}
elements.sent-2411-069: In section 2, we have introduced that $C_\mathrm{NJ (R^2_{\lambda )=2-\frac{1 {\lambda^2}$ has given by Yang \cite{04 , in fact, the exact value of the $C_\mathrm{NJ (X)$ constant for the Bana\'s Fr\k{a czek space can also estimated by the above theorem, just as the following corollary states.}}}}}}
elements.sent-2411-070: Let $\xi=\eta=1$, then we have $L_\mathrm{Y J (1,1,R_{\lambda ^2)=2-\frac{1 {\lambda^2}$ by Theorem \ref{key .}}}}
elements.sent-2411-071: It's known that when $\xi=\eta=1$, the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi, \eta, X)$ constant is just the $C_\mathrm{NJ (X)$ constant, hence\begin{equation}L_Y J(1,1,R_{\lambda}^2)=C_NJ(R^2_{\lambda})=2-\frac{1}{\lambda^2}.\end{equation}.}}
elements.sent-2411-072: By the preceding Theorem \ref{key , let $\lambda=1$, we have $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,R^2_{1 )=1$.}}}
elements.sent-2411-073: Then we obtain $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,X)=1$ since the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space refers to the aforementioned space $X$.}}
elements.sent-2411-074: In \cite{08 , the author provided a sufficient condition for judging the super-reflexivity of a Banach space through the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,X)$ constant.}}
elements.sent-2411-075: From the relationship between the $L_\mathrm{Y J (\xi,\eta,X)$ constant and super-reflexive spaces, we have the following corallary.}
elements.sent-2411-076: According to Theorem \ref{key , for $\lambda\geq1$,\begin{equation}1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}})<2,\end{equation}is always valid.}
elements.sent-2411-077: Hence the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space is super-reflexive.}
elements.sent-2411-078: Furthermore, by considering whether the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space has weak normal structure, we draw the following corollary.}
elements.sent-2411-079: Prior to presenting this corollary, we shall introduce a lemma provided by Liu.
elements.sent-2411-080: For $\eta\leq\xi<\frac{3 {2}\eta$, if $1\leq\lambda<\sqrt{\frac{4\xi\eta {6\xi\eta-3\eta^2 }$, then we have \begin{equation}L_Y J(\xi,\eta,R_{\lambda}^2)=1+\frac{2\xi \eta}{\xi^2+\eta^2}(1-\frac{1}{\lambda^{2}})<\frac{(\xi+\eta)^2+(2\eta-\xi)^2}{2(\xi^2+\eta^2)}.\end{equation}.}}}
elements.sent-2411-081: This implies the Bana\'s-Fr\k{a czek space has weak normal structure by Lemma \ref{c .}}
